no: Extends Ascension with a quest to redeem Jon Irenicus. Installs with warnings — REPLACE_BCS_BLOCK for JAH_NO_JON.BAF may fail if Jaheira Recast modifies JAHE25.BCS (harmless). Requires Ascension to be installed first. Fix applied: eet-mod-forge-patches component #17. If install fails with 'iconv could not be found', ensure a clean game directory — an incomplete mod folder from a previous install can prevent the full mod from being copied.

conflicts.reason: Both modify FINSOL01 states 27-32 but use additive EXTEND_BOTTOM/I_C_T with independent conditions. Install Longer Road before Kelsey.
conflicts.source: PPG/Kelsey tp2 uses EXTEND_BOTTOM/I_C_T on FINSOL01 27-32, LR uses same; additive ops, different guards, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Imoen Romance dialogues block ToB final

conflicts.theirComps: Convenient/Cheating Machine of Lum the Mad -> Convenient: You can simply select the desired result, #21

conflicts.reason: Both modify portraits for Irenicus. Last installed wins
Both modify portraits for Irenicus. Last installed wins

Both modify portraits for Irenicus. Last installed wins
Install Lichdom BEFORE The Longer Road. Users reported installation errors when installed after.

in.t: LongerRoad.tp2 line 313, change REPLACE_BCS_BLOCK to EXTEND_TOP (Jaheira Recast compatibility). Or use eet-mod-forge-patches #17.

sum: Expands Irenicus's storyline into ToB, offering a quest to resurrect and redeem (or re-destroy) him. Adds several hours of new content with moral weight.

co.no: INSTALLS WITH WARNINGS: 'cannot find block matching JAH_NO_JON.BAF' in JAHE25.BCS. Not caused by another mod — file is unmodified (12659 bytes throughout). The JAH_NO_JON.BAF pattern targets vanilla BG2's Jaheira romance script, which differs in EET. EET compatibility gap. Jaheira-Irenicus interaction in ToB may not trigger correctly.

co.n: Restore Irenicus's original portrait from SoA.
co.tp2n: Restore Irenicus's original portrait from SoA.
co.no: Restores Irenicus's SoA portrait instead of ToB version.
